title: 1. Hua1 Gu3 Yi1 and Hua1 Gu3 Si4 (LKC):
text:
189
DMG77-12
•
Hua1 Gu3 Yi1: These four points are located on the plantar surface of the foot, between
the 1st and 2nd metatarsal bones, 0.5 cun, 1.0 cun, 1.5 cun, and 2.0 cun proximal to the
intervening interdigital web separating the 1st and 2nd toes. Needle 0.5 to 1.0 cun (have the
patient forcefully inhale while rapidly inserting needles). {Spleen, Lung, Kidney, and Liver
Reaction Areas}
•
Hua1 Gu3 Si4: This point is located on the plantar surface of the foot between the 4th and 5th
metatarsal bones, 1.5 cun proximal to the interdigital web separating the 4th and 5th digits.
Needle 0.5 to 1.0 cun. {Lung and Kidney Reaction Areas}
190
Polyuria (LKC-5)
